markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.161 — Definition

In this subchapter, “solid waste” has the meaning assigned by Chapter 361 (Solid Waste Disposal Act) , Health and Safety Code, except that it does not include hazardous waste.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “solid waste” has the meaning assigned by Chapter 361 (Solid Waste Disposal Act) , Health and Safety Code, except that it does not include hazardous waste.
